headline: OnePlus officially gives up on the US and Europe
summary: OnePlus exits US and European markets. Parent company Oppo will honor existing support and warranties. Devices will transition to Oppo's ColorOS for updates.

headline: Skullcandy's bass-boosting Crusher headphones now come with Bose's ANC
summary: Skullcandy introduces new Crusher wireless headphones. They feature Bose's QuietControl ANC and spatial audio. Unique design includes dedicated bass drivers for deep frequencies.

headline: HP's OLED-equipped 2-in-1 laptop is a solid back-to-school deal
summary: Best Buy offers a significant discount on the HP OmniBook X Flip 2-in-1. The laptop features an OLED display and Intel Core 7 Ultra CPU. It's now $999.99, down from $1,649.99.

headline: Apple's reportedly raising the price for AppleCare Plus on Macs and iPads
summary: AppleCare Plus subscriptions for Macs and iPads are set to increase. New sign-ups will see a monthly rise of $0.50 or $5 annually. Existing subscribers will not be affected by the price change.

headline: Magic's Marvel Super Heroes Commander Decks Are Discounted on Amazon
summary: Amazon is discounting the new Magic: The Gathering x Marvel Super Heroes Commander decks. Shoppers can find bundle deals on these preconstructed sets. The article helps players determine the best value.

headline: Get 24% Off the Philips OneBlade 360 Shaver and Trimmer at Amazon UK
summary: Save 24% on the Philips OneBlade 360 hybrid razor at Amazon UK. This versatile grooming kit is now available for £37.99. It offers comfortable shaving and trimming capabilities.

headline: The Hawk Review
summary: A review of Netflix's new series, "The Hawk," has been published. Will Ferrell stars, but reportedly not in a comedic role. The show lacks his typical funny characters.

headline: Fantasy Tactical RPG Langrisser: Sea of Sword Announced with Debut Trailer
summary: A new fantasy tactical RPG, Langrisser: Sea of Sword, has been revealed. The announcement includes a debut trailer for the game. Further details are expected to follow.

headline: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
summary: Argentina's football team faces FIFA disciplinary action. Players displayed a banner supporting Falkland Islands claims. This occurred during their World Cup semi-final celebration.

headline: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply
summary: The Scunthorpe steelworks has been nationalized by the UK government. This action aims to protect a vital national supply. New government powers enabled this public ownership.

headline: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
summary: TikTok is under investigation by UK regulator Ofcom. The probe focuses on the platform's child age verification processes. A previous review found TikTok "not safe enough" for children.

headline: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
summary: Protests have erupted in Ukrainian cities. The demonstrations are against President Zelensky's dismissal of the defense minister. The president has not explained the controversial decision.
